criteria.notes: Extensive use of ADS React components (PageHeader, PageFooter, Grid, Table, Field, Label, ErrorMessage, Select, etc.) all rendering correctly in screenshot.
ADS component props use tokens internally, but custom CSS (StatusBadge inline styles, app.css) uses hardcoded color values instead of --ams-* tokens.
main.tsx (493 chars) includes compact.css import; screenshot shows compact-density table rows and typography consistent with compact mode.
PageHeader with Amsterdam logo, brand name, and navigation renders correctly; PageFooter with Spotlight section and menu links is properly styled in dark theme.
NieuweAanvraag.tsx uses proper ADS Field/Label/ErrorMessage composition with InvalidFormAlert; form page not shown in screenshot but ADS CSS is clearly loaded.
ADS Table component with Header, Body, Row, HeaderCell, Cell subcomponents renders with proper styling, row separators, and bold headers visible in screenshot.
Only @amsterdam/design-system-react, react, react-dom, and react-router-dom are used; no MUI, shadcn, Chakra, or other banned libraries.
WizardSteps component with 4 labeled steps and current-step highlighting exists; NieuweAanvraag implements full step navigation with state management.
Per-field validation in validateStep functions for all 4 steps with inline ADS ErrorMessage components and Field invalid prop binding.
InvalidFormAlert component used with heading, headingLevel, errors array, and focusOnRender for summary error display on step submission.
All required input types present: TextInput (text/email/tel), Select (stadsdeel), Radio (permit type), DateInput (startdatum), Checkbox (akkoord), TextArea (beschrijving).
Step 4 'Controleren' uses DescriptionList component to show read-only summary of all entered data with a submit button.
All visible text in screenshot is Dutch: headings, labels, column names, footer content, navigation links, and descriptive paragraphs.
Clear B1-level text with active voice: 'Hier vindt u alle ingediende vergunningaanvragen', 'Klik op een rij om de details te bekijken', 'Bel 14 020'.
Status labels in Dutch visible in screenshot (Ingediend, In behandeling, Goedgekeurd, Afgewezen) with colored badges; error messages in code also in Dutch.
App.tsx uses BrowserRouter with Routes for / (Dashboard), /nieuw (NieuweAanvraag), and /zaak/:id (ZaakDetail) with Layout wrapper.
tsconfig.json with strict mode; proper TypeScript types (FormData interface, Stadsdeel/VergunningType type aliases); tsc --noEmit passes clean.
